Notes: Single UPDATE contains an add_rr and a delete_rrset for the same owner/type. The prerequisite ensures the name exists before the UPDATE. Follow-up QUERY checks whether the RRset survives, is removed, or the UPDATE was rejected.

Steps.Description: Add an A RR to x.campus.edu. and delete the entire x.campus.edu. A RRset in the same UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: x.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset exists after the UPDATE.
